code: export class UserLiveFeedParser{constructor(){this._data={username:'',figure:'',message:''};}flush(){this._data={username:'',figure:'',message:''};return true;}parse(wrapper){try{const username=wrapper.readString();const figure=wrapper.readString();const message=wrapper.readString();console.log('[LIVE FEED] Username:',username);console.log('[LIVE FEED] Figure:',figure);console.log('[LIVE FEED] Message:',message);this._data={username,figure,message};return true;}catch(e){console.error('[LIVE FEED] Error reading strings from wrapper',e);return false;}}}
